item.label: Remove hooks.yml and update CLI
item.summary: Delete docs/knowledge/sync/hooks.yml and remove CLI hooks commands

body: The hooks.yml file defines hook eligibility rules that should be removed. Also, the CLI has hooks-related commands (`_print_hooks()` and `_print_evaluate()`) that need to be removed from cli.py. The config.py also references `hook_config_file` which needs to be removed.
